---
title: "OrgTree Policy Targeting — Intune + Azure Policy Dual Transport"
subtitle: "Architecture Decision Record · ADR-039 · ACCEPTED"
date: 2026-04-20
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Architecture Decision Record

**ADR-039** — status: **ACCEPTED** — decided: **2026-04-20**

This page renders the canonical ADR source verbatim. The authoritative
source is at [`src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-039-policy-targeting.md`](../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-039-policy-targeting.md).
Any change to this ADR's content happens in the source file; this
wrapper is regenerated by `scripts/generate_adr_qmd_wrappers.py` per
[ADR-068](adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-039-policy-targeting.md >}}
